lastItems.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
lastItems.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

lastItems.title: Google I/O 2026: Gemini 3.5 Flash, Omni (NanoBanana for Video), Spark (background agents), and Antigravity 2.0
Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
lastItems.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
